compiled_state.title: Remove redundant sprint Step 1a2 Test Coverage Enforcement, replaced by test quality overlay
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Remove Sprint SKILL.md Step 1a2 (Test Coverage Enforcement) which dispatches sub-agents to write missing tests for untested source changes. This step is now redundant because:

1. The test quality overlay (dso:code-reviewer-test-quality) catches test bloat at the review pipeline level
2. The pre-commit test quality gate blocks anti-pattern tests before commit
3. The test gate (pre-commit-test-gate.sh) already enforces test coverage via .test-index mapping

Step 1a2 was a sprint-level mechanism that only caught untested changes during sprint execution. The new pipeline-level overlay catches bloat regardless of origin (sprint, fix-bug, review resolution, manual).

### Steps
1. Read plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md
2. Remove the entire Step 1a2 section (Test Coverage Enforcement)
3. Renumber subsequent steps if needed (Step 1a3 becomes Step 1a2, etc.)
4. Verify no other parts of the sprint SKILL reference Step 1a2

### File Impact
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md (modify — remove Step 1a2)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Step 1a2 (Test Coverage Enforcement) is removed from sprint SKILL.md
  Verify: { grep -q "Step 1a2.*Test Coverage Enforcement" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md; test $? -ne 0; }
- [ ] No dangling references to "Step 1a2" remain in the sprint SKILL.md
  Verify: { grep -q "Step 1a2" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md; test $? -ne 0; }
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
